text: compactConventions() is the wrong layer for discoverability — it mixes protocol rules with content discovery
compactConventions() doesn't actually use the 'full' parameter — it's a static hardcoded string, not a derived artifact
Proposal contradicts user's conditional loading preference — adds unconditional text instead of headers-then-load-on-demand
Code-driven pointers require deploy to update — backwards for cross-environment model where Desktop/Web/Mobile can only write to Munin
Should be a separate 'references' field in orient, not inside conventions — orient already has pattern for sibling fields (notes, dashboard)
Reference index must be JSON not markdown — markdown reintroduces interpretation drift
compactConventions() false provenance claim should be fixed — remove unused 'full' param and correct docs
